ev-access-start.state: The memory-mode sign-in form is ready for an approved staff identity.

control.label: Sign in
control.instruction: Enter the approved identity and select Sign in.

ev-access-fix.state: The platform administrator has opened Marco Reyes's scoped-role sheet to apply the minimum approved warehouse grant.

control.label: Grant scoped warehouse access
control.instruction: Select only the approved scoped role for Marco Reyes, then verify the resulting access with a new session.

ev-p2p-start.state: A requester is drafting the first step of a new purchase request.

control.label: Continue request
control.instruction: Complete the required purchase need and line items, then select Continue.

ev-p2p-rfq-evidence.state: The procurement officer has selected RFQ / Canvassing for the seeded request.

control.label: Confirm RFQ route
control.instruction: Review the quotation evidence and confirm the RFQ sourcing route.

ev-p2p-rfp-evidence.state: The procurement officer has selected RFP / Bidding for the seeded request.

control.label: Confirm RFP route
control.instruction: Review the competition evidence and confirm the RFP sourcing route.

ev-p2p-po.state: Approved seeded demand is available for controlled PO authoring.

control.label: Author purchase order
control.instruction: Select Author from approved request and retain the approved demand link.

ev-p2p-receive.state: Warehouse procurement is reviewing seeded receivable purchase orders.

control.label: Receive supply
control.instruction: Open the receivable order and hand it to governed warehouse receiving.

ev-p2p-payment-pack.state: Finance has opened the seeded closed PO and can inspect its full governed record beside the payment-readiness evidence.

control.label: Inspect full PO record
control.instruction: Open the full PO record and review the receipt, acceptance, invoice, and amount match before deciding readiness.

ev-vendor-start.state: Legal administration is preparing a new masked demo vendor invitation.

control.label: Continue vendor invite
control.instruction: Enter the verified vendor identity and continue to the governed invitation review.

ev-vendor-apply.state: The seeded vendor portal application is open for vendor-owned updates.

control.label: Save application draft
control.instruction: Complete the vendor-owned fields and save the accreditation application draft.

ev-setup-start.state: The warehouse administrator has opened Add storage area at the warehouse selector.

control.label: Select warehouse
control.instruction: Select the governed warehouse that will own the storage area.

ev-setup-area.state: The warehouse administrator is naming a controlled area in Add storage area.

control.label: Storage area label
control.instruction: Enter the controlled storage-area label for the selected warehouse.

ev-setup-bin.state: The warehouse administrator is defining the scannable bin code in Add storage area.

control.label: Scannable bin code
control.instruction: Enter a unique code that matches the physical shelf label.

ev-setup-route.state: The warehouse administrator has opened the seeded operation-route editor.

control.label: Save operation route
control.instruction: Review the configured source, destination, and evidence controls, then save the route.

ev-receive-start.state: Warehouse procurement is reviewing the seeded open supplier deliveries.

control.label: Open supplier delivery
control.instruction: Open the matching receivable purchase order before accepting physical delivery.

ev-receive-record.state: The logistics supervisor has selected a seeded product and quantity for the receipt draft.

control.label: Add receipt line
control.instruction: Select the delivered product and quantity, then add the governed receipt line.

ev-receive-putaway.state: The logistics supervisor has opened the putaway scanner for accepted stock.

control.label: Add stock for putaway
control.instruction: Scan or enter accepted stock before selecting its controlled destination bin.

ev-quality-start.state: The logistics supervisor is reviewing the seeded pending-inspection queue.

control.label: Inspect pending stock
control.instruction: Open the matching pending receipt or return for quality inspection.

ev-quality-release.state: The seeded inspection sheet is set to Accepted for putaway with required evidence attached and submission enabled.

control.label: Release accepted stock
control.instruction: Submit the accepted disposition after reviewing required inspection evidence.

ev-quality-return.state: Warehouse procurement is reviewing the quality queue handoff from a supplier order.

control.label: Open vendor-return handoff
control.instruction: Open the quality queue and prepare the supplier return disposition with source evidence.

ev-event-fulfillment-start.state: The business-unit owner is viewing seeded events and the New event command.

control.label: Create event demand
control.instruction: Select New event and record accountable demand before reservation.

ev-event-issue.state: Warehouse operations is reviewing seeded reserved allocations ready to issue.

control.label: Issue allocated stock
control.instruction: Select Issue only for the matching approved allocation and custody recipient.

ev-return-start.state: Warehouse operations has opened the governed return form for seeded custody.

control.label: Match returned custody
control.instruction: Select the accountable event or custody source before recording returned stock.

ev-return-restock.state: The seeded return form is set to Restock (back to available).

control.label: Record restock return
control.instruction: Record the accepted return so availability and custody reconcile.

ev-return-quarantine.state: The logistics supervisor has set a seeded inspection to Place on hold with a reason and required evidence attached.

control.label: Quarantine return
control.instruction: Submit the supported hold disposition so non-accepted stock remains unavailable.

ev-return-adjustment-handoff.state: Warehouse finance has entered a deterministic physical variance ready for approval handoff.

control.label: Submit supported adjustment
control.instruction: Submit the variance with count, reason, value, and custody evidence for controlled approval.

ev-count-start.state: Warehouse finance is selecting the controlled location and count scope.

control.label: Select count location
control.instruction: Select the controlled location and category for the count sheet.

ev-count-enter.state: The warehouse logistics supervisor has entered the observed physical quantity on the authorized cycle-count sheet.

control.label: Enter physical count
control.instruction: Enter the observed product quantity on the controlled count sheet and retain accountable count evidence.

ev-count-investigate.state: The logistics supervisor is reviewing seeded count lines with Variances only enabled.

control.label: Investigate count variance
control.instruction: Filter to variances and compare movements, custody, and recount evidence.

ev-count-post.state: The warehouse administrator has approved the deterministic stock change and the cycle-count adjustment is posted.

control.label: Review posted adjustment
control.instruction: Confirm the approved result; an auditable stock movement corrected the ledger without rewriting history.

ev-admin-start.state: The platform administrator is reviewing the seeded user register before opening a named access request.

control.label: Manage named user
control.instruction: Open Marco Reyes's record and compare the requested scope with current assignments before making a change.

ev-admin-activate.state: The warehouse administrator has enabled the seeded controlled alternate receiving route and is ready to save it.

control.label: Activate warehouse operation route
control.instruction: After deliberately enabling Active, save the validated warehouse route so it becomes available for governed receiving.

ev-allocation-start.state: The business-unit owner is preparing a seeded reservation from approved demand.

control.label: Reserve event stock
control.instruction: Select Reserve and tie the request to approved event demand.

ev-allocation-reserve.state: Warehouse operations is reviewing seeded reserved stock and the Issue command.

control.label: Reserve and issue stock
control.instruction: Issue only the reserved quantity to the accountable custody record.

ev-price-start.state: The pricing analyst is reviewing the seeded landed-cost and turnover table.

control.label: Prepare landed-cost basis
control.instruction: Open the product row and review landed cost, valuation, and turnover before proposing price.

ev-doa-start.state: Legal administration is preparing a seeded immutable DOA revision.

control.label: Add DOA tier
control.instruction: Add the governed approval tier and retain the prior active matrix.

ev-doa-activate.state: Legal administration is reviewing a deterministic approved DOA revision at the controlled activation command.

control.label: Activate DOA revision
control.instruction: Activate the approved revision deliberately and retain the superseded version and audit evidence.

ev-recover-start.state: The memory-mode sign-in form shows a masked incomplete retry after a workflow access failure.

control.label: Review failed attempt
control.instruction: Verify the failed state and committed outcome before retrying.

ev-recover-retry.state: The memory-mode sign-in form contains masked corrected credentials ready for one retry.

control.label: Retry once
control.instruction: After verifying no committed session exists, select Sign in once.
